changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TYPE VariableType as ENUM ('PROCESS_REVENUE', 'SYSTEM_NUMBER_OF_REC', 'CONSTANT');
CREATE TABLE metric_formula_items ( id serial, quant_metric_id integer DEFAULT NULL, ordinal integer DEFAULT 0, name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, description text, variable_type VariableType DEFAULT NULL, value float DEFAULT NULL, is_operation boolean DEFAULT false, operation VariableOperation DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_metric_formula_items PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_metric_formula_items_to_quant_metric FOREIGN KEY (quant_metric_id) REFERENCES quant_metrics (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_metric_formula_items_quant_metric ON metric_formula_items (quant_metric_id); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX ui_metric_formula_items_quant_metric_ordinal ON metric_formula_items (quant_metric_id, ordinal);
